_doc: Pre-registered fixed scan universe for the observe_only disclosure-feature pipeline.
_criterion: Largest liquid US large-cap constituent(s) per GICS sector (index-defined, public). NOT derived from the portfolio — overlap with held names is incidental (everyone holds mega-caps); the selection rule is book-independent and reproducible, so the list reveals nothing about the book.
_why_fixed: observe_only validation needs a fixed, pre-registered universe so rank-IC / Deflated-Sharpe are not contaminated by selection bias. News/SNS-driven (already-moving) names would bias the sample and break reproducibility — those belong in the crowding feature, not the scan universe.
_spend_note: First backfill ~= count x --limit DeepSeek calls (deepseek-chat, ~JPY 0.1/disclosure). Recommended: --limit 6 for the first run; the daily cron then only pays for genuinely new filings (skip_existing dedup).
